title: Set up Upstash Redis in a Next.js project
summary: Install @upstash/redis, configure REST credentials, add caching and rate limiting with @upstash/ratelimit ŌĆö works on Vercel Edge, Cloudflare Workers, and Node.js.
declaration: I will set up Upstash Redis using the HTTP-based @upstash/redis client. This is the correct Redis client for Next.js Edge Runtime and Vercel deployments. If you need traditional TCP Redis (ioredis / node-redis), say so before I begin.
